side_effects.description: Intense lower abdominal spasm that came on rapidly shortly after injection, lasted an hour, pain was so bad caused dry heaving. Occurred with both Sermorelin and Tesamorelin.
Body and palm itching alongside abdominal spasm with Sermorelin; no itching with Tesamorelin

protocol_notes: Used Sermorelin for a couple of months before the abdominal spasm side effect appeared. Had 3 attacks over about a week before identifying the cause. Took a break of a few months, then tried Tesamorelin, which caused the same abdominal spasm about a month in. Had to discontinue both -morelin peptides due to this side effect.
